title: 2008-2010 Enterprise Funds

WATER 
Organizational Chart by Function 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
6
Mission Statement 
 
To provide a safe, reliable, and cost-effective water supply; to ensure 
that wastewater is treated and disposed of in an environmentally 
acceptable way. 
 
Service Description 
 
The Water Department is responsible for purchasing water from the San 
Diego County Water Authority (SDCWA) and delivering it throughout the 
City for domestic, commercial, irrigation, and fire protection purposes. 
The City has a direct water filtration plant that treats up to 25 million 
gallons per day of water received from the SDCWA and a reverse 
osmosis plant that treats up 6.3 million gallons per day of brackish 
groundwater. Reservoirs are maintained at levels to prevent any
